name: Rise of the Guardians
description:
All of the characters! (Do anything you want, I do not care, just make sure you have fun ^^)

[May not be 100% perfect! I can't help that they go out of character sometimes, sorry!]

Recommended to speak in first person or address yourself by name, that way it doesn't get confused!
[Sorry if it speaks for you! Something I can not fix, edit and refresh messages as you go if needed!]
-Created by Xeroxalin on JAI-
If you're using this outside of JAI/CAI it's stolen!

Leave honest reviews and suggestions! I check reviews every day and will read them all <3
creator: Wolforrex
